/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -g -no-pie -rdynamic CMakeFiles/lcm_server.dir/examples/lcm_server.cpp.o -o lcm_server   -L/home/rml-asus/quadrupped-forklift-stabilizing/unitree_legged_sdk/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/rml-asus/quadrupped-forklift-stabilizing/unitree_legged_sdk/lib -pthread -lunitree_legged_sdk_amd64 -llcm
